layout.name: nocollision_blockyGlobe
layout.title: Disable Collision
layout.tooltip: If true, objects can move through it.

layout.name: movement_blockyGlobe
layout.title: Movement
layout.tooltip: LunaLua function to define and customize the Block Movement.

children.title: Circle
children.tooltip: Makes the Block fly in circles.

layout.name: isSizable_blockyGlobe
layout.title: Sizable Rendering
layout.tooltip: If true, Block will render like sizable. (Only works if image is bigger than 64x64!)

layout.name: stretch_blockyGlobe
layout.title: Stretchy Rendering
layout.tooltip: If true, Block will render stretchy if bigger than usual.

layout.name: repeat_blockyGlobe
layout.title: Repeating Texture
layout.tooltip: If true, Block will have a repeating texture if bigger than usual.
